title: acalypha lepidopagensis
intro: Acalypha lepidopagensis, also known as the cat's whisker plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acalypha lepidopagensis include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to lower blood pressure. Acalypha lepidopagensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used as a topical ointment or cream to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
